name: Baby Padang
notes: Also known as Padang Padang Rights. Mid tide is the most reliable window; high tide is softer and forgiving, while low tide exposes more reef.
description: Baby Padang is the sheltered beginner and intermediate wave beside the Padang Padang channel. It breaks smaller and softer than the exposed Bukit reefs, with a short right into the channel and a longer left that can peel toward Impossibles when the swell and tide line up. The channel makes the paddle-out unusually easy for the area.
hazards: strong channel current on bigger swells
can become too fast above head high
